verses.en: Woe to every scorner and mocker
verses.id: Celakalah bagi setiap pengumpat dan pencela,

verses.en: Who collects wealth and [continuously] counts it.
He thinks that his wealth will make him immortal.
verses.id: dia (manusia) mengira bahwa hartanya itu dapat mengekalkannya.

verses.en: No! He will surely be thrown into the Crusher.
verses.id: Sekali-kali tidak! Pasti dia akan dilemparkan ke dalam (neraka) Ḥuṭamah.

verses.en: And what can make you know what is the Crusher?
verses.id: Dan tahukah kamu apakah (neraka) Ḥuṭamah itu?

verses.en: It is the fire of Allāh, [eternally] fueled,
Which mounts directed at the hearts.
Indeed, it [i.e., Hellfire] will be closed down upon them
verses.id: Sungguh, api itu ditutup rapat atas (diri) mereka,
(sedang mereka itu) diikat pada tiang-tiang yang panjang.
